div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:

This implementation guide provides implementation resources and guidance in support of applying the WHO recommendations on emergency care.</br>This implementation guide is part of the WHO Smart Guidelines approach to support countries to integrate WHO global data and health recommendations into digital systems accurately and consistently.

title.value: WHO Emergency Care Guideline Implementation Guide

description.value: This implementation guide provides implementation resources and guidance in support of applying the WHO recommendations on emergency care.</br>This implementation guide is part of the WHO Smart Guidelines approach to support countries to integrate WHO global data and health recommendations into digital systems accurately and consistently.
WHO Immunization
WHO Medication Request
WHO PractitionerRole
WHO Group
WHO CareTeam
WHO Practitioner
WHO Encounter
WHO RelatedPerson
WHO MeasureReport
WHO Service Request
WHO Appointment
The WHO Core AllergyIntolerance profile defines conformance requirements and exchange expectations for AllergyIntolerance resources in WHO Smart Guidelines content.
WHO Group Definition
WHO Medication Not Requested
WHO Patient
WHO EpisodeOfCare
WHO Condition
WHO Service Not Requested
WHO Location
WHO Procedure Not Done
WHO Organization
WHO Procedure
WHO CarePlan
WHO Observation
WHO Immunization Not Done
WHO Observation Not Done
The location at which the reported data was generated
Indicates the event was not performed, or did not occur for a specified reason.
Set of codes identified as being needed but not found in existing Code Systems

name.value: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth

description.value: Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element
The client's identity is unknown or the client's prefers to remain anonymous
The caregiver wants to receive SMS or other messages regarding the client's contacts/visits and health status
The client was referred by a Health Care Worker in the community or another Health Care Facility
The client's mother and father's vital status
The client's mother and father's vital status
The client/caregiver will provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
The client's time of birth (if <1 day old)
the child could have been created from the mother therefore a relatedpersom may already exist
EmCare Encounter
EmCare Patient
EmCare CommunicationRequest
EmCare RelatedPerson Caregiver
